result.finding: No explicit container-level health checks configured (no Dockerfile HEALTHCHECK, no docker-compose healthcheck, no Kubernetes probes). However, Spring Boot Actuator is included as a dependency and all endpoints are exposed (management.endpoints.web.exposure.include=*), providing a built-in health endpoint at /actuator/health.
evidence: No Dockerfile HEALTHCHECK instruction (no Dockerfile present)
No docker-compose healthcheck section (no docker-compose.yml present)
No Kubernetes liveness/readiness probes (no K8s manifests present)
values: Spring Boot Actuator health endpoint: /actuator/health (HTTP GET)
No container-level health check probe configured
Recommendation: configure liveness/readiness probes pointing to /actuator/health when containerizing
